code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: MUST include <Reasoning> (brief analysis) and <Rating> (1-5) tags
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Multiple product failures across purchases/updates
    - Safety hazards or immediate product failure
    - Explicit "don't buy" recommendations with anger/frustration
    - Negative updates overriding initial positive experience

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Core functionality failure despite partial usability
    - Regret expressed through phrases like "waste of money"
    - Significant flaws requiring constant workarounds

    3 Stars (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with contextual limitations
    - "Does the job but..." phrasing without recommendation
    - Technical competence with notable compromises

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Explicit star deduction for SINGLE functional criticism
    - Requires preprocessing/break-in period for full function
    - Maintains recommendation despite clear secondary flaws
    - Short positive statements lacking enthusiasm ("They work")

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Concise unambiguous praise of core functionality ("Fit perfect")
    - Multiple positive aspects (2+ features) without negatives
    - Dismissed minor issues via "still 5 stars" declarations
    - Long-term validation (≥6mo) with sustained performance
    - Non-functional criticism with enthusiastic core praise

    BOUNDARY CLARIFICATIONS:
    - "Works perfectly despite [non-functional]" →5
    - "Would be 5 stars but [functional]" →4
    - Multi-purchase failures →1 regardless of initial experience
    - Temporary issues resolved enthusiastically →5
    - Inherent material properties ≠ product flaws
</DynamicRules>
</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1 (5-Star Concise):
Review: Fit perfect into my CHV1210. Silent operation works flawlessly!
<Reasoning>Unambiguous functional praise without negatives. Core achievement →5.</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 2 (4→5 Correction):
Review: Does exactly what needed. Deep pockets handle any mattress thickness.
<Reasoning>Concise functional praise without drawbacks →5 (previously misclassified as 4).</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 3 (Gold 4):
Review: These towels require 2 washes for full absorbency but work well after.
<Reasoning>Functional requirement mentioned as drawback →4.</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 4 (1-Star Update):
Review: UPDATE: Second unit failed faster than first. Dangerous defects!
<Reasoning>Multi-purchase failure with safety concern →1.</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 5 (5-Star Dismissed Issue):
Review: Trash can has minor lid quirk but silent/durable. Still 5 stars!
<Reasoning>Enthusiastic recommendation overrides non-functional issue →5.</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 6 (4-Star Functional):
Review: Blender makes perfect smoothies but occasionally overheats.
<Reasoning>Core functionality praise with reliability criticism →4.</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 7 (5-Star Multi-Feature):
Review: Silent operation, space-saving design, durable build. Perfection!
<Reasoning>Three positive aspects without negatives →5.</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 8 (2-Star Regret):
Review: Premium look but cracks under normal use. Wouldn't rebuy.
<Reasoning>Core failure despite aesthetics →2.</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 9 (3-Star Balance):
Review: Decent for price. Holds items but feels flimsy during moves.
<Reasoning>Balanced assessment without recommendation →3.</Reasoning>
<Rating>3</Rating>

Example 10 (5-Star Long-Term):
Review: EDIT: After 1yr still perfect! Minor delay irrelevant.
<Reasoning>Long-term validation outweighs trivial quirk →5.</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>
</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (34 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 15
  gold 5 -> 4: 9
  gold 4 -> 3: 4
  gold 1 -> 2: 3
  gold 3 -> 2: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "These skull and bones are plenty big to be seen from a distance. You get two in the package and they measure 21"x18.5". You could use them in your home or office. Even though these are the pirate skull and bones, they are smiling and don't look scary..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 3, 4] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "Very nice set of skillets - and what a lovely color.  Quite a bargain, and I was glad to find it as I provide my husband his "own" skillets.  He tends to be a "high heat" cook, and so I don't let him use my expensive skillets.  Was nice to find Farbe..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "I really like these potholders. They look great and do a good job of keeping hot pots and pans and other dishes out of the oven off the table and counters. They had a bit of a plastic smell when they arrived but after I washed them (they held up fine..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "There is only one problem for the experienced cook when it comes to this set - you're likely to already have one or more of these tools and possibly Oxo Good Grips at that! That's why I think this set is best suited for someone setting up a kitchen f..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "We are both tough on dish towels and use them constantly. Not only do we cook 90% of our meals at home but we also use fresh fruits and veggies with pretty much every meal and that means a lot of washing, drying and carrying things around...why carry..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "I like this towel. It is 100% Turkish cotton and measures 27 inches by 55 inches. The dobby weave is somewhat intricate so you are going to get some good absorbency. This towel also comes in a bath sheet, which is competively priced with the local st..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "This looks like a great idea and easy to use, but actually it's very awkward. The idea is to hang your jewelry in the closet. But the hanger part doesn't swivel, so if you want to select an item, you have to remove it from the closet and lay it on th..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [1, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "I bought these mainly for sending leftovers. It is easier than sending my rubbermaid containers because I am not out much money if they don't come back."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 3, 4] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "This is a good, though not extra ordinary storage bin. It lacks exceptional build quality, exceptional attention to detail, or anything that's all that remarkable. It looks good, and the pattern is timeless, plus it keeps stuff together. You could do..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  3. Review: "I bought one of those Pyrex sets a few years ago.  You know, the one that came with the blue lids and some of the containers were rectangular --large and small-- while others were round (like these).  Well, turns out that the ones I used the most wer..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 34 errors, 23 borderline out of 80 examples."}
